content:
I’m a computer science PhD student at the Human-Centered Computer Systems Lab at Seoul National University under supervision of professor Youngki Lee. My current research focuses on mobile and edge computing towards ubiquitous computing system.
I received my masters at Deep Learning and Image Processing Group in Computer Graphics and Image Processing Lab about medical image processing and deep learning.
I graduated from DigiPen Institute of Technology with a B.S in Computer Science in Real-Time Interactive Simulation and worked on Minecraft: Education Edition at Microsoft Studios as a software engineer.
summary: I’m a computer science PhD student at the Human-Centered Computer Systems Lab at Seoul National University under supervision of professor Youngki Lee. My current research focuses on mobile and edge computing towards ubiquitous computing system.
title: Jingyu Lee
Liver Segmentation in Abdominal CT Images via Auto-Context Neural Network and Self-supervised Contour Attention
Automatic Registration between Dental Cone-Beam CT and Scanned Surface via Deep-Pose Regression Neural Networks and Clustered Similarities
Deeply Self-Supervised Contour Embedded Neural Network Applied to Liver Segmentation
Pose-Aware Instance Segmentation Framework from Cone Beam CT Images for Tooth Segmentation

content:
DigiPen Game Gallary Official Website
Somnus was my senior year project at DigiPen Institute of Technology with team BlackPen (Team of 4 programmers, 1 designer, 4 artists and 3 sound designers) developed in Unreal Engine 4.
In Somnus you play Melanie, a young shutterbug who wakes up in the middle of the night to find her two favorite stuffed animals have ventured into a mysterious dreamscape in her wardrobe. As Melanie you must help your stuffed companions make their way through the world using your magical camera to solve unique perspective illusions.
Somnus was nominated as a top 5 finalist at 2016 E3 College Game Competition and invited as an exhibitor at E3.
As a technical director in the team, I was in charge of solving technical issues and worked closely with a producer to manage engineering resources of the team.
Accomplishments:
 Implemented interactable objects with AI. Implemented gameplay mechanic of the main character which utilizes the camera to solve the puzzle Implemented 3D object projection tool for prototyping level design Collaborated with artists to create materials, animations, and cut-scene Added C++ based Blueprint helper functions for game data log system
summary: 3D puzzle platformer that utilizes perspective illusions to manipulate the environment *(2016 E3 College Game Competition Finalist)*
title: Somnus

content:
This was my personal project that I implemented from scratch for CS550(Physics Simulation) class at DigiPen.
Accomplishments:
 GJK for convex collision checking EPA for collision record generation GJK Simplex visualization EPA Polytope visualization Constraints-based using Sequential Impulse solver, developed by Erin Catto Contact caching Warm starting Baumgarte stabilization Friction and restitution
summary: Rigidbody constraint-based physics simulation built from scratch using C++
title: Rigidbody Constraint-based Physics Simulation

content:
Official Website
Bomvoid was my junior year project at DigiPen Institute of Technology with team of 6 programmers developed in C++ from scratch.
Bomvoid is a 3D, third-person view puzzle game which a player encounters a number of challenges to reach the goal point with not losing all the flock. The player can overlook obstacles of current level with minimap and plan the way to go through, with abilities that are temporarily providing with getting items. Also, try number counting feature gives challenging experiences.
As a technical director in the team, I managed the technical progress of the team and designed the main game mechanic and levels.
Accomplishments:
 Designed component-based C++ engine from the scratch Implemented in-game editor for platformer style map Implemented puzzle system Custom .ini based serialization tool for game Designed entire game idea/ levels Implemented main character with dynamic control of the particles
summary: 3D, third-person view puzzle game built from scratch using C++
title: Bomvoid

DigiPen Game Gallary
Musika was my sophomore year project at DigiPen Institute of Technology.
Musika is 2D platformer about some notes which have been kicked out of their place in the music sheet by some false notes and want to go back to their place.
summary: 2D platformer about some notes which have been kicked out of their place in the music sheet by some false notes and want to go back to their place
title: Musika
